title: VRL Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: VRL Logistics is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at VRL Logistics. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Allahabad-based team.

About VRL Logistics:
VRL Logistics is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with VRL Logistics!
